underlying_goal: Optimize real-time interpretation latency by understanding VAD/transcription metrics, propagating trace context across services, setting up latency monitoring boards, and shipping related changes
friction_detail: Claude initially assumed single dataset when user was querying all datasets; also some queries returned empty requiring multiple retries to get working results.
brief_summary: User wanted to understand and optimize interpretation latency through Honeycomb analysis, trace propagation across websocket/worker services, and a dedicated latency board — most was achieved with code shipped and board created, with trace propagation partially working and still being refined.
